description.en: Specifies the priority of the fetch request relative to other requests of the same type. Must be one of the following:highA high priority fetch request relative to other requests of the same type.lowA low priority fetch request relative to other requests of the same type.autoNo user preference for the fetch priority. It is used if no value is set or if an invalid value is set.Defaults toauto.

description.en: An object containing options for initiating aprivate state tokenoperation. Possible properties include:issuersAn array of strings containing the URLs of issuers that you want to forward redemption records for. This setting is ignored unlessoperationis set tosend-redemption-record, in which case theissuersarray must be included.operationA string representing the type of token operation you want to initiate. When specifying theprivateTokenoption, this property is mandatory. Possible values are:tok
